title: ferray-autodiff: gradient() allocates O(n^2) — should reuse buffer
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

gradient() creates a new Vec<DualNumber<T>> of size n for each of the n partial derivatives. Total allocation is O(n^2). Fix: pre-allocate a single Vec of constants, toggle args[i].dual = 1 before evaluation, read result, reset args[i].dual = 0. Saves n-1 Vec allocations.
